mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com_file ( pgm_id, ref_id, org_file_nm, stored_file_nm, file_path, relative_path, file_ext, mime_type, file_size, sort_order, description, uploader_id, uploader_ip, is_deleted, ins_dt, ins_id ) VALUES ( #{pgmId}, #{refId}, #{orgFileNm}, #{storedFileNm}, #{filePath}, #{relativePath}, #{fileExt}, #{mimeType}, #{fileSize}, COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), #{description}, #{uploaderId}, #{uploaderIp}, FALSE, NOW(), #{insId} )
mapper.select: SELECT file_id, pgm_id, ref_id, org_file_nm, stored_file_nm, file_path, relative_path, file_ext, mime_type, file_size, sort_order, description, uploader_id, uploader_ip, is_deleted, del_dt, ins_dt, ins_id, upd_dt, upd_id FROM com_file WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT file_id, pgm_id, ref_id, org_file_nm, stored_file_nm, file_path, relative_path, file_ext, mime_type, file_size, sort_order, description, uploader_id, uploader_ip, is_deleted, del_dt, ins_dt, ins_id, upd_dt, upd_id FROM com_file WHERE pgm_id = #{pgmId} AND ref_id = #{refId} AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY sort_order ASC, ins_dt ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE com_file SET is_deleted = TRUE, del_dt = NOW() WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
